_README: Canonical firm profile for Blue Print Constructs / RK Residential Homes and Commercial Constructions LLC. Source: C:\Users\rnuduru1\OneDrive\Blueprint Constructs (extraction date 2026-05-23). PII (bank account #, SOS password, personal cell, customer SSNs/addresses, etc.) intentionally omitted from this file. See firm/README.md for refresh procedure.
legal_name: RK Residential Homes and Commercial Constructions, LLC
dba_aliases: RK Residential Homes and Commercial Constructions LLC dba Blue Print Constructs
RK Residential Homes and Commercial Constructions LLC dba That 1 Painter, North Texas
sam_status_notes: Active CAGE 9LET0 + active UEI LM4YHVQ71QG7 suggest a prior SAM.gov registration. Current Active/Inactive status and last-renewal date NOT FOUND in any read file. User to verify at sam.gov before next federal submission.
year_founded_source: BPC info.docx "Year established: 2022"; corroborated by capability statement, BPC profile, and Beck Group pre-qual (date business started 01/07/2022)
naics_notes: Union of NAICS lists across BPC info.docx, BPC Profile.pdf, Capability Statement, MBE certificate, SBE certificate. 236220 (Commercial & Institutional Building Construction) is the typical primary for the active bid pipeline (TAMU, ASU, USFWS, TXANG); 236118 (Residential Remodelers) corroborates the residential-mitigation past performance.
business_size_notes: SBE certificate (DFW MSDC, certificate DL09279) attests the firm meets SBA small-business size under 13 CFR Part 121 and the SBE cap at 49 CFR 26.65(b). NAICS-specific small-business thresholds (e.g. $45M for 236220) should be confirmed each fiscal year before claiming on a specific federal solicitation.

set_aside_eligibility.tx_hub_status: Certified (Texas Comptroller HUB Program via DFW MSDC affiliate)

registered_address_source: BPC info.docx; corroborated by Lavon RV Park contract and Beck Group pre-qual (16283 Willowick Ln, Frisco, TX 75033). Address used for SOS filing.
mailing_address_alternate_source: Commercial GL policy SBCC-042443-00 from American Builders Insurance / Appalachian Underwriters lists this as the named insured's mailing address. The Willowick Ln street is on the Frisco/Little Elm border; both city-zip combos appear in firm records. User to reconcile.
phone_personal: [REDACTED — personal cell on file; not to be published in bid submissions per BPC-Submission-Package/PLACEHOLDERS-TO-FILL.md Section G policy]
website_notes: Inferred from email domain blueprintconstructs.com. User to verify the live URL before listing on a formal submission.

key_personnel.name: Ravikiran (Rocky) Nudurupati
key_personnel.title: Founder & Managing Director / Owner (100%)
key_personnel.credentials: PMP (Project Management Professional); Certified Scrum Master (CSM); SAFe 5.0 Advanced Scrum Master; ITIL trained
key_personnel.education: M.C.A. (Master's in Computer Applications), Andhra University; B.Com (Bachelor's in Commerce), Andhra University
key_personnel.role_notes: Founder. Per Beck Group pre-qual: 100% ownership, position held since 2022, age 45 at time of 2023 filing. Prior 20 years as Sr. Program & Delivery Leader at Magellan Health, JCPenney, Bank of America, Wells Fargo, Xerox — managed teams of 25-150+, multimillion-dollar budgets.
key_personnel.construction_specific_experience: Founder/operator of Blue Print Constructs since 2022. Led commercial renovation projects for hospitality clients including Holiday Inn (Hall Park). Preferred vendor status with City of McKinney, City of Dallas, and Red Elephant.
key_personnel.source_file: BPC/Rocky Business Profile.docx; BPC/BPC info.docx; Beck Group/Pre-Qual Beck Group.pdf

key_personnel_notes: Only Rocky's full bio is in the BPC source folder. Project Manager, Superintendent, Safety Officer, Estimator, Quality Manager named personnel NOT FOUND in BPC files — user must supply current personnel + bios + credentials before any TAMU/ASU/USFWS/USACE proposal submission. The Records folder Sheet 'Contact Details of Employees' was not read for PII reasons.

insurance.insurance_notes: Only the Commercial GL policy was text-extractable from the BPC folder. The COI summary PDF (BPC/BPC COI.pdf) is an image-only scan and could not be parsed by the extraction script. Workers Comp carrier/limits, Auto Liability, Umbrella/Excess, Professional, Pollution — all NOT FOUND. User must surface a current COI before any bid submission that requires named-insured-on-ACORD details (which is essentially all federal, all state, and most institutional bids in scope).

insurance_broker.notes: Broker identity not in extracted files. User to supply — `outreach/04-email-insurance-broker.md` in each bid workspace assumes a broker contact exists.

bonding.status: Bond Letter PDF (BPC/Bond Letter_RK Residential Homes and Commercial Constructions, LLC dba Blue Print Constructs.pdf) is an image-only scan; extraction script returned 32 characters of text (insufficient to parse). Source file is on file with the firm; the bond letter itself is presumed valid and current as of 2025-07 (Lavon RV Park scope and contract references 'Blue Print Constructs agreed to provide a bond for $1MM ... and procurement of the same is in progress' — implies single-project capacity of at least $1M is achievable). User to surface surety name, agent contact, and current single-project + aggregate capacity values from the on-file letter.
bonding.source_file: BPC/Bond Letter_RK Residential Homes and Commercial Constructions, LLC dba Blue Print Constructs.pdf
bonding.lavon_reference: Lavon RV Park contract (signed 2025) references a $1,000,000 performance bond procurement — single-project capacity floor is at least $1M based on willingness to procure for that project.

self_perform: Drywall and sheetrock — install, tape, bed, texture
Flooring — laminate, vinyl, LVT, tile, hardwood refinish
Trims and baseboards / crown molding / interior carpentry
Roofing (composition, flat, metal — repairs and replacement)
Project supervision, general conditions, scheduling, QA/QC
served_sectors: Residential — high-end custom homes, multi-unit residential, housing developments
Commercial — office buildings, retail spaces, hospitality / hotel renovation
Institutional — schools, healthcare facilities, religious assembly, community centers
trade_capabilities.service_radius: North Texas + central Texas; primary operations in Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex (Denton, Collin, Dallas, Tarrant counties); has executed in Brazos County (College Station), Tarrant County (Southlake), Collin County (Frisco, McKinney, Farmersville), El Paso County (per separate Best Western El Paso venture, not under BPC)
trade_capabilities.source_file: BPC/BPC info.docx; BPC/Blueprint Constructs Capability Statement.pdf; BPC/BPC Details.xlsx (Vendors sheet); BPC/Rocky Business Profile.docx

past_projects.name: Lavon RV Park — 30-lot RV park new construction
past_projects.contract_type: Standard AIA A101-2020 fixed-price; AIA A201-2020 general conditions
past_projects.scheduled_substantial_completion: 2026-04-30 (per contract; status not in source file)
past_projects.completion_date_notes: Per contract: 6-9 month duration from start; SOURCE FILE is the executed contract, no completion certificate sighted. User to confirm whether project is substantially complete before citing as 'completed past performance' on a federal bid.
past_projects.scope_summary: Build 30 RV lots: mobilization + excavation, rough grade, driveway/culvert, utility trenching (electrical, plumbing, septic), individual meters per lot, water lines, septic tank + sewer, final grading, storm drain + detention, rip-rap, 6-ft cedar wood fencing each lot, metal gate each lot, 8x8 storage shed each lot, 30 trees, mulch + sod, park lights, dumpster/storage/laundromat sheds, 150-LF retaining wall, laundromat building. Storm shelter in scope.
past_projects.bond: $1,000,000 performance bond per contract Article 8 (procurement in progress at contract signing)

past_project_selection_rules.purpose: Per the user task, surface 3 most-relevant past projects per bid workspace — not all 5+. Selection rationale below.

tamu-harrington-2025-06813.rationale: Single-room educational lab renovation, ~1,200 SF, institutional / higher-ed scope.

angelo-state-carr-efa-26-007.rationale: University dressing-room renovation (TX higher-ed, performing arts support), occupied building.

usfws-san-marcos-140FC126R0017.rationale: Federal site / building scope — rehab shop + 2-stall garage build; site work, MEP, finishes.

cmd-post-ndi-W50S7626QA001.rationale: Air National Guard renovation of Command Post + NDI rooms; MEP-heavy interior reno with secure-doors/hardware and electrical scope.

pais-cabin-140P6026Q0029.rationale: Workspace not yet provisioned in this repo. Solicitation PDFs are inventoried under inbox/opportunities/attachments/2026-05-21/. When the workspace is created, default picks: Lavon RV Park (small-structure new build), Hindu Temple of Southlake (institutional finish-out), Holiday Inn Hall Park (commercial reno).

safety_performance.notes: All safety-performance numbers NOT FOUND in any extracted BPC file. Per `BPC-Submission-Package/PLACEHOLDERS-TO-FILL.md` Section E, user must supply. The firm's self-declared safety statement in the Capability Statement ('accident-free job sites') is marketing copy and cannot stand in for a documented EMR / TRIR / LTIR record.

missing_data_flags: SAM.gov current status + last-renewal date NOT FOUND. CAGE 9LET0 and UEI LM4YHVQ71QG7 are valid identifiers but current registration state is unconfirmed. Register/renew at sam.gov before any federal submission (USFWS San Marcos 140FC126R0017, USACE PAIS cabin 140P6026Q0029, TXANG Cmd Post W50S7626QA001).
TX HUB certificate (VID 1874292998900) expired 2024-08-31 per source file. Recertify before any TAMU / ASU / TX state bid that scores HUB participation.
DFW MSDC MBE certificate (DL09279) expired 2024-08-31 per source file. Recertify; MBE recognition cascades into HUB recognition under the DFW MSDC / TX Comptroller MOU.
DFW MSDC SBE certificate (DL09279) expired 2024-08-31 per source file. Recertify.

Commercial General Liability policy SBCC-042443-00 (American Builders Insurance / Appalachian Underwriters) expired 2024-09-25 per source file. Surface current/renewed COI before any bid submittal — every active workspace needs ACORD evidence to attach.

Workers Comp, Auto Liability, Umbrella/Excess, Professional Liability, Pollution Liability — NO CARRIER OR LIMITS FOUND in extracted files. User must supply each before any bid that requires ACORDs (which is nearly all of them).
Insurance broker / agent identity NOT FOUND. Each bid workspace has an outreach/04-email-insurance-broker.md draft that assumes a broker exists.

Bond surety, agent name, agent phone, agent email, single-project capacity, aggregate capacity, current bonded backlog — NOT FOUND in extractable text (Bond Letter PDF is an image scan). User to surface from the on-file letter, OR the bonding agent will issue a fresh project-specific commitment letter for each bid (see each bid's outreach/05-email-bonding-agent.md or outreach/03 or outreach/04 depending on workspace).
Annual revenue (FY-1, FY-2, FY-3) NOT FOUND. Required by every PQQ / SQS / TAMU CSP financial questionnaire.
EMR (3-year), TRIR, LTIR, OSHA Recordable count, OSHA citation history — NOT FOUND. Required by every PQQ, every TAMU CSP, every federal solicitation with a safety questionnaire.

Project Manager, Superintendent, Safety Officer, Estimator, Quality Manager — named personnel with current credentials NOT FOUND. Rocky Nudurupati's bio is the only complete bio in BPC source files. User must supply current personnel before any submission requiring key-personnel resumes.

Client references — names, current titles, current emails, current phones, project names + values + years — NOT FOUND in a structured format. Per BPC-Submission-Package/PLACEHOLDERS-TO-FILL.md Section H, the featured-client list (That 1 Painter, Touchmark, Bridge View Build, Hill Design Build) needs current named contacts before any reference list ships.
Bank reference — bank name, branch, relationship manager, last bank reference letter date — NOT FOUND. Per PLACEHOLDERS-TO-FILL.md Section G.
ISNetworld / Avetta / Veriforce member IDs — NOT FOUND. Likely not held given firm size; mark N/A on each bid if not held.
TX RCAT roofing license number, EPA RRP Lead-Safe cert number, municipal contractor license numbers — NOT FOUND. Confirm whether held; mark N/A on each bid if not.
Website live-URL verification — blueprintconstructs.com inferred from email domain but not verified live as of this extraction.

Address reconciliation — BPC info.docx says 16283 Willowick Ln, Frisco, TX 75033; Commercial GL policy says 16283 Willowick Ln, Little Elm, TX 75068-1210. Same street, different city/zip on the Frisco/Little Elm border. User to confirm which is the current SOS-of-record address and which is the current physical mailing address.
